zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad ferch Hywel於0900年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特時，她的父親Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons21歲，母親Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales6歲。她於0931年與King Tudor Trevor of Hereford在威爾士丹比爾丹比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於0944年在法國享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad ferch Hywel于0900年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特时，她的父亲Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons21岁，母亲Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales6岁。她于0931年与King Tudor Trevor of Hereford在威尔士丹比爾丹比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于0944年在法国享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad ferch Hywel was born in 0900, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, was 21 and her mother, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, was 6. She married King Tudor Trevor of Hereford in 0931, in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 0944, in France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad ferch Hywel est née en 0900, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé King Tudor Trevor of Hereford en 0931, à Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 0944, à France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad ferch Hywel 0900 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons 21 und ihre Mutter Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales 6. Sie hat 0931 in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales King Tudor Trevor of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 0944 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Hywel è nata il nel 0900 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato King Tudor Trevor of Hereford nel 0931, nel Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 0944, nel Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Hywelが0900年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで生まれた時，父Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britonsは21歳，母Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Walesは6歳であった。0931年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアデンビグでKing Tudor Trevor of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は0944年にフランスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Hywel(이)가 0900년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 0931년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 덴비그h에서 King Tudor Trevor of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 0944년 프랑스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Hywel nasceu em 0900, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com King Tudor Trevor of Hereford em 0931, em Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 0944, em França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad ferch Hywel родилась в 0900 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Tudor Trevor of Hereford в 0931 г. в местности денбаи, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 0944 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angharad ferch Hywel nació en 0900, en Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, tenía 6 años. Se casó con King Tudor Trevor of Hereford en 0931, en Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 0944, en Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
